cards.title: Canada business dynamics analysis added
cards.excerpt: Added a new analytics project using Statistics Canada data to compare regional business openings, closures, and net creation between Q1 2024 and Q1 2025.

cards.title: Resume Builder implementation update
cards.excerpt: Shipped the initial Resume Data Pool Builder implementation with schema-driven profile structure, local editor UI, and GitHub Pages deployment.

cards.title: Project roadmap update
cards.excerpt: Added the eBay Seller Assistant project and queued an AI Resume Builder in backlog planning.

cards.title: Personal website architecture update
cards.excerpt: Switched to single-source multilingual translation and moved blog content management to repository data.
